## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect information corrected)
- [ ] New content (new topic, section, or lab)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested any code/commands in the labs
- [ ] Zone files validated with `named-checkzone`
- [ ] RFC references are correct and linked
- [ ] Navigation links updated if new file added
- [ ] No real/sensitive IP addresses used (use 192.0.2.x, 2001:db8::x)
